text.title: Diff-Coverage Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of the coverage-diff policy, the PR comment, and the trend dashboard payload.

forbidden.pattern: pr_comment.headline_metric uses whole-repo coverage instead of diff coverage
policy.overrides[] entry without reason field OR with reason shorter than 10 words
aggregated-only diff coverage reported without per-file breakdown
exclusion list grows by > 5 paths between consecutive cleanup PRs without testing-lead approval
merge_gate_verdict = pass while any file falls below its per-file threshold (aggregate masking per-file fail)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Round per-file percent to nearest integer for the PR comment; keep float precision in dashboard payload.
Collapse adjacent low-coverage lines into a `lines 42-78 uncovered` range in the comment for readability.
Show a "delta from main" column when the file already existed; show only "new file" diff coverage for newly created files.

list.item: Diff coverage is the primary metric in the PR comment
Per-file thresholds enforced; no aggregate-only gate
Every exclusion has a reason and was reviewed within 6 months
Monthly testing meeting reviews the trend and exclusion list
Low-coverage files surface in the dashboard, not just the PR-of-the-week
